uplink.description: fPort 2 door open, no alarm, 5 opens, last open 120 min
uplink._note: fPort 2 door-status frame; byte0 bit0x01=open, bit0x02=alarm; oracle-checked against upstream decodeUplink (DOOR_OPEN_STATUS=OPEN, ALARM=FALSE, TIMES=5, DURATION=120, epoch 1468316792).

uplink.description: fPort 2 door closed with alarm, 12 opens, last open 300 min
uplink._note: byte0=0x02 -> CLOSE + ALARM TRUE; oracle-checked against upstream (DOOR_OPEN_STATUS=CLOSE, ALARM=TRUE, TIMES=12, DURATION=300, epoch 1468320392).

uplink.description: fPort 3 datalog: two records (current open+alarm, prior closed) -> history
uplink._note: fPort 3 history frame; each 11-byte record decoded like fPort 2. Oracle-checked against upstream DATALOG [TRUE,OPEN,5,120,...],[FALSE,CLOSE,6,200,...]. Current reading at top level, prior in history[] with time.

uplink.description: fPort 4 config report (yaml example): TDC, disalarm, keep status/time
uplink._note: Upstream uplinkDecoder example [0x31,0x61,0x8E,0x57,0x40,0x61,0x8E]; oracle-checked against upstream (TDC=3236238, DISALARM=1, KEEP_STATUS=0, KEEP_TIME=24974). Config frame: no vocabulary key, all extras.

uplink.description: fPort 5 device status: battery 3.096 V, firmware 1.1.4, EU868
uplink._note: fPort 5 status frame; oracle-checked against upstream (SENSOR_MODEL=LDS03A, FIRMWARE_VERSION=1.1.4, FREQUENCY_BAND=EU868, SUB_BAND=NULL, BAT=3.096). Battery mV->V per volts vocabulary.
Upstream uplinkDecoder example for an unknown fPort; upstream returns errors:['unknown FPort'].
Length guard: a door-status frame is 11 bytes.
